modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: First-time request for academic accommodations from Office of Accessibility.

full_description_text: 
Student is trying to get academic help. This is their first time asking. They submitted a form to the Office of Accessibility. Not sure what happens next.
